productDisplayName: Nike Women's Aqua Blue Polo T-shirt
description: White short sleeve polo neck t-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, has horizontal aqua blue stripes in descending widths and violet bold stripe on the chest and upper back, vented hem, buttoned placket, ribbed collar and cuffs, grey fabric tape on inseam of collar and embroidered logo on left chest
